input.code:
# Load required libraries
library(DESeq2)
library(tidyverse)

# Read counts and metadata
counts <- read.csv('counts_de.csv', row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
metadata <- read.csv('metadata_de.csv', row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)

# Ensure columns match
counts <- counts[, rownames(metadata)]

cat("Counts matrix:", nrow(counts), "genes ×", ncol(counts), "cells\n")
cat("Metadata:\n")
print(table(metadata$cell_type))

# Create DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = as.matrix(counts),
  colData = metadata,
  design = ~ cell_type
)

cat("\nDESeqDataSet created\n")
cat("Design: ~cell_type\n")
cat("Samples:\n")
print(colData(dds))
